name: Cabbage Thoran
tagline: Kerala-style coconut cabbage stir-fry — fiber, vitamin K, vitamin C
highlight: Cabbage barely cooked — keeps crunch, vitamin C, and freshness

hero.alt: Pale-green cabbage stir-fry with grated coconut and curry leaves
hero.caption: cabbage thoran — coconut, mustard, curry leaf

healthFacts: Cabbage delivers vitamin K and vitamin C — supporting clotting and antioxidant systems.
Sulforaphane and other glucosinolates support liver phase-2 detox enzymes.
Very low calorie (~30 kcal per cup raw) — pairs well with rice without driving meal load up.
Fresh coconut adds healthy fat for fat-soluble vitamin absorption.

steps.title: Tempering
steps.detail: Heat coconut oil in a wide pan. Crackle mustard seeds, add urad dal till golden. Add curry leaves and green chili.
steps.tip: Hot tempering is the soul of Kerala stir-fries — don't crowd the pan with vegetables before this finishes.

steps.title: Cabbage and onion
steps.detail: Add chopped onion, sauté 1 minute. Add shredded cabbage and turmeric. Toss on high heat for 4–5 minutes till just wilted but still crisp.
steps.tip: Keep heat high; cover only briefly. Long covered cooking turns cabbage limp and bitter.

steps.title: Finish with coconut
steps.detail: Stir in fresh coconut and salt, cook 1 more minute. Off heat. Eat warm with rice and dal.
steps.tip: Squeeze lime at the table for vitamin C and brightness.
